title: Individual Income Tax Return Statistics (formerly T1 Final Statistics) - Canada.ca
content:
## Individual Income Tax Return Statistics (formerly T1 Final Statistics)
The publication Statistics on Individual Income Tax Returns presents data drawn from processed individual income tax and benefit returns for a given tax year. This data provides a detailed overview of taxpayers by age, gender, income ranges, sources of income, and province or territory of residence.
- 2026 (for the 2024 tax year)
- 2025 (for the 2023 tax year)
- 2024 (for the 2022 tax year)
- 2023 (for the 2021 tax year)
- 2022 (for the 2020 tax year)
- 2021 (for the 2019 tax year)
- 2020 (for the 2018 tax year)
- 2019 (for the 2017 tax year)
- 2018 (for the 2016 tax year)
- 2017 (for the 2015 tax year)
- 2016 (for the 2014 tax year)
- 2015 (for the 2013 tax year)
- 2014 (for the 2012 tax year)
- 2013 (for the 2011 tax year)
- 2012 (for the 2010 tax year)
- 2011 (for the 2009 tax year)
